meta.description: MendLab is a premier science-driven wellness and physical recovery lab in Cairo, offering advanced recovery protocols, physical rehabilitation, therapeutic massage, cupping therapy (Hijama), and dry needling.

hero.title: Recover Smarter. Perform Better.
hero.subtitle: MendLab bridges advanced sports science and traditional therapy to optimize your physical restoration, performance, and overall well-being.

mission.title: Recovery, redefined by science
mission.body: To redefine the recovery landscape in Cairo by delivering premium, hygienic, and scientifically backed physical restoration services — while ensuring a comfortable, empowering, and results-driven experience for every client.

why.title: Why Choose MendLab
why.subtitle: Recovery here is not simply a treatment — it is a structured, evidence-based process designed to help you restore, perform, and thrive.

items.title: Science-Driven Protocols
items.body: Every treatment follows structured, evidence-based recovery science.

items.title: Premium Clinical Space
items.body: A refined, professionally managed clinical environment.

items.title: Exceptional Hygiene
items.body: Sterile, single-use protocols and meticulous cleanliness.

items.title: Athlete-Focused Care
items.body: Specialized services for athletes and active lifestyles.

servicesPreview.title: Our Services
servicesPreview.subtitle: Massage and cupping services designed around how you move, train and feel.

cta.title: Ready to feel the difference?
cta.subtitle: Book your first session at MendLab and start recovering the smart way.

services.title: Massage & Cupping Services
services.subtitle: Heal Better. Move Better. Live Better.
services.tagline: Heal Better. Move Better. Live Better.

wet-dry-cupping.name: Wet/Dry Cupping Therapy
wet-dry-cupping.short: Helps detoxify the body, improve circulation and relieve pain.
wet-dry-cupping.description: Traditional cupping therapy — wet or dry, chosen to suit you — using controlled suction to decompress tissue. It helps detoxify the body, improve circulation and relieve pain.
howItWorks: Your therapist assesses the area and prepares the skin under strict hygiene.
Cups are applied and the suction is adjusted to your comfort.
For wet cupping, sterile single-use tools are used throughout.
Cups are removed and the area is cleaned and assessed.

back-massage-cupping.name: Back Massage + Cupping
back-massage-cupping.short: Relieves tension, improves circulation and reduces pain.
back-massage-cupping.description: A focused back massage combined with cupping. The pairing releases built-up tension through the back, improves circulation and reduces pain.
howItWorks: A short assessment identifies the tightest areas across your back.
Massage techniques work through the back muscles.
Cups are applied to decompress tissue and boost circulation.
The session finishes with lighter work to settle the area.

upper-massage.name: Upper Massage
upper-massage.short: Targets the neck, shoulders, upper back and arms.
upper-massage.description: A targeted massage for the upper body — neck, shoulders, upper back and arms. Ideal where training load and daily posture build up the most tension.
howItWorks: A short assessment identifies tight and overloaded areas.
Targeted techniques treat the neck, shoulders, upper back and arms.
Pressure is tailored to your comfort and your therapist's recommendation.
The session closes with mobility work for the area.

upper-package.name: Upper Package
upper-package.short: Upper massage + cupping for complete upper body relief.
upper-package.description: Our upper massage combined with cupping for complete upper body relief — the most thorough option for the neck, shoulders, upper back and arms.
howItWorks: A short assessment identifies tight and overloaded areas.
Targeted massage works through the neck, shoulders, upper back and arms.
Cupping is added to decompress tissue and boost circulation.
The session closes with mobility work for the area.

full-body-massage.name: Full Body Massage
full-body-massage.short: Full body massage session to relax muscles and restore balance.
full-body-massage.description: A full body massage session covering upper and lower body, designed to relax the muscles and restore balance from head to toe.
howItWorks: A full assessment maps tension across the whole body.
Upper and lower body are treated within one structured session.
Pressure and pace are tailored to your comfort.
The session closes with lighter strokes to aid relaxation.

full-body-package.name: Full Body Package
full-body-package.short: Full body massage + cupping for maximum recovery.
full-body-package.description: Our full body massage combined with cupping for maximum recovery — the most complete session we offer, covering the whole body.
howItWorks: A full assessment maps tension across the whole body.
Full body massage works through the upper and lower body.
Cupping is applied across the areas that need it most.
The session closes with mobility work and guidance for home.

about.title: Where sports science meets traditional therapy
about.intro: MendLab is a premier science-driven wellness and physical recovery lab based in Cairo, Egypt. Founded to bridge the gap between advanced sports science and traditional therapeutic practices, we deliver evidence-based recovery solutions designed to optimize physical restoration, performance, and overall well-being.

story.title: Our Story
story.body: MendLab specializes in advanced recovery protocols, physical rehabilitation, therapeutic massage, and specialized cupping therapy (Hijama) — serving athletes, fitness enthusiasts, and individuals seeking high-quality recovery and wellness services. Every treatment is delivered within a premium, highly hygienic, and professionally managed clinical environment that prioritizes safety, effectiveness, and client comfort.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: To redefine the recovery landscape in Cairo by delivering premium, hygienic, and scientifically backed physical restoration services — while ensuring a comfortable, empowering, and results-driven experience for every client.

items.title: Evidence First
items.body: We follow the science, not trends.

items.title: Personal Care
items.body: Programs built around you, not a template.

items.title: Genuine Results
items.body: We measure success by how you feel and move.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.name: Ahmed Hosny
leadership.bio: Ahmed Hosny is the CEO and Founder of MendLab. With an academic background in Physical Therapy and a strong foundation in sports science and physical rehabilitation, he established MendLab with a vision of modernizing traditional therapeutic practices through evidence-based methodologies. His work integrates contemporary sports recovery science with traditional wellness approaches — including Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) and advanced cupping therapy — drawing on extensive knowledge of muscle plasticity, recovery science, performance optimization, and plyometric training mechanisms. Passionate about sports performance and sports marketing, he develops targeted recovery strategies and educational content that help competitive athletes, fitness enthusiasts, and everyday clients achieve optimal physical restoration and performance.
